metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: The royal treasury was plundered and its relics hidden in dungeons across the realm. Reclaim them and return them to the vault in Mapleshire.

towns.name: Mapleshire
towns.description: A sleepy village surrounded by ancient oaks and whispering meadows.

key_dungeons.name: Frozen Stronghold
key_dungeons.description: A narrow crevice leads into Frozen Stronghold. The sound of dripping water echoes endlessly below.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Descend into Frozen Stronghold and find the Ivory Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The passage grows more treacherous with every floor.
